name: libwww-mechanize-perl
title: libwww-mechanize-perl
summary: module to automate interaction with websites
description:
module to automate interaction with websites
WWW::Mechanize, or Mech for short, helps you automate interaction with
a website. It supports performing a sequence of page fetches including
following links and submitting forms. Each fetched page is parsed and
its links and forms are extracted. A link or a form can be selected, form
fields can be filled and the next page can be fetched. Mech also stores
a history of the URLs you've visited, which can be queried and revisited.

commands.name: mech-dump
commands.description: Dumps information about a web page

arguments.description: Dumps information about a web page
arguments.raw: -dump  Dumps information about a web page

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use mech-dump because module to automate interaction with websites.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use mech-dump as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `mech-dump [options] [file|url]` as documented upstream for mech-dump.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair mech-dump with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `mech-dump --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

arguments.name: -dump
arguments.description: Dumps information about a web page
